hero.title: AgentSphere
taglines: Deploy Agents. They Work for You.
No Ocean Needed — Just a Box.
hero.description: AI Agents run in an isolated computer — they can only see files you explicitly allow, so your privacy and data stay protected. Supports OpenClaw, Hermes and more. One click to create, as easy as installing an app.

oneclick.title: One-Click Setup
oneclick.desc: Supports OpenClaw, Hermes and other popular AI Agent projects. Just click and create — no technical skills required.

gui.title: Visual Interface
gui.desc: Fully graphical, what you see is what you get. No command line, no complex config — anyone can get started.

security.title: Privacy & Security
security.desc: Agents run in an isolated sandbox, completely separated from your system. Only the files you explicitly authorize are visible — your private data never leaks.

native.title: Native Performance
native.desc: Built directly on native virtualization across Windows / macOS (WHVP / Hypervisor.framework). No third-party software needed — fast and lightweight.

virtio.title: Seamless Experience
virtio.desc: See the screen, hear the audio, share files, copy and paste both ways — feels just like using a local app.

network.title: Instant Connectivity
network.desc: Networking is set up automatically. Your Agent is online the moment it starts — zero manual configuration.

step1.title: Download & Install
step1.desc: Install the Windows / macOS package like any other app — download and go.

step2.title: Pick an Agent
step2.desc: Choose the AI Agent you need (OpenClaw / Hermes and more), then create it with one click.

step3.title: Start Using
step3.desc: It launches automatically — open it up and start working with your Agent right away.

install.title: Download & Install
install.subtitle: Pick your platform — installation takes just a few minutes.

windows.title: Windows
windows.desc: Windows 10/11 with Windows Hypervisor Platform (WHVP) enabled.

macos.title: macOS
macos.desc: macOS 12+, with native support for both Apple Silicon and Intel.

linux.title: Linux
linux.desc: Debian 11+ / Ubuntu 20.04+ / Raspberry Pi OS 11+ on amd64 / arm64 (validated on Raspberry Pi 5). Requires glibc 2.31+ and /dev/kvm.
linux.footnote: After install, a pairing URL is printed — open the
linux.footnote_after: to claim the host and manage it remotely.
